steps.step: Migration 0049 generated additively (5 nullable TEXT ADD COLUMN, no FK/index/default/drop)
steps.notes: Filename 0049 confirms 49 prior files (0000-0048); matches VALIDATE correction.

steps.step: Migration applied to dev DB via direct psql DDL (push-managed-DB gotcha — NOT db:push/db:migrate)
steps.command: psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U root -d local -c 'ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ap_circuit_id text' (x5)
information_schema.columns WHERE column_name='ap_circuit_id' for all 5 tables
steps.notes: credit_ledger, network_sessions, payment_checkouts, payment_transactions, points_ledger — all: text, is_nullable=YES.

steps.notes: record-payment 9 tests (incl. INSERT-only + not in update set); network-location 7 tests (tiers 1/1-no-cid/3/unresolved).

steps.step: AC6 (static tripwire) — resolveApCircuitPreTx( appears before db.transaction( in both grant functions
steps.notes: 2 tests; per-function line-order design (not whole-file), positive anchors non-vacuous.

steps.command: cd apps/admin && bunx vitest run src/lib/server/queries.spec.ts
steps.notes: 2 tests. Agent-Probe leg (rendered admin page) + human verification handoff STILL PENDING — Hybrid gate second half.
apLabel()/revenueByAp() bytes UNTOUCHED (verified by diff). No pre-existing revenueByAp unit test to re-run; protected structurally + full-suite green.

steps.step: Full regression — typecheck (all apps + core) and full vitest suite
steps.command: bun run check ; cd packages/core && bunx tsc --noEmit ; bun run test
steps.notes: check: 0 errors across 3 apps. core tsc: exit 0. Suite: core 76, locator 6, customer 125, admin 151 — all pass. (Note: bare `bun test` uses bun's native runner and mis-reports; `bun run test` = vitest fan-out is the real gate.)

steps.step: Lint (scoped per plan step 26 — no NEW errors from this plan's files)
steps.command: bunx eslint <touched files> ; bunx prettier --check <touched files>
steps.notes: eslint exit 0 on all touched source. Prettier: all EDITED existing files were already drifted at HEAD (pre-existing 297-file repo-wide drift); my 2 new drifted spec files were formatted. No NEW lint failures introduced.
